name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
summary: Meta Platforms, Inc. builds technology for human connection and communication. Its Family of Apps includes Facebook, Instagram, Messenger, and WhatsApp, enabling people to connect, share content, and build communities. Meta also develops augmented and virtual reality hardware and software under its Reality Labs segment, including VR headsets and AI glasses, and is investing heavily in artificial intelligence to power transformative experiences across its platforms.

products.name: Facebook
products.description: Social networking platform for connecting people, sharing content, and building communities.

products.name: Instagram
products.description: Photo and video sharing social platform with messaging and community features.

products.name: Messenger
products.description: Messaging app enabling communication between individuals and groups.

products.name: WhatsApp
products.description: Encrypted messaging and communication app used globally.

products.name: Meta Quest (VR headsets)
products.description: Virtual reality headsets enabling immersive experiences as part of the next computing platform.

products.name: AI glasses
products.description: Smart glasses enabling augmented reality and AI-powered experiences.

products.name: Meta AI
products.description: Artificial intelligence technologies powering experiences across Meta's Family of Apps and new platforms.
